text: Sabke saamne taane ne tumhe sirf hurt nahi kiya, tumhari social standing ko bhi hila diya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pehle se sarkari naukri fail ka darr tha. Ab layoff ka khatra alag se chipak gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se feared consequence mirror karna - future collapse ka darr.
text: Tumhe lag raha hai ki ab dono raaste band ho rahe hain aur future haath se nikal raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, isi liye sunn ho jata hoon. Soch bhi nahi pa raha kya karna.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Single focused question se core conflict ko sharpen karna.
text: Iss waqt sabse tez chubhan kis baat ki hai: taana, layoff ka risk, ya khud ki izzat tootna?

speaker: Seeker
text: Izzat tootna sabse zyada. Ghar pe kya face karunga wahi sochta rehta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens F se shame collapse ki emotional quality mirror karna.
text: Jaise us moment ne tumhe andar tak beqeemti mehsoos karwa diya ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Thoda halka feel hua bolke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Intensity 3 par hidden shame ko clearly reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum gehri sharam le kar baithe ho, jaise tumhari poori pehchaan hi kat gayi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi pakda.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sarkari-fail + layoff pressure context mein emotion normalise karna and worth separate karna.
text: Jab already sarkari pressure ho aur upar se layoff ka fear aaye, aisa shame normal hai. Iska matlab yeh nahi ki tum kam ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda settle ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Structural reframe देना - public taunts often management dysfunction reflect karte hain.
text: Public taunts aur layoff threats kaafi baar toxic management pattern hote hain, individual worth ka final judgement nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab kya karoon aaj?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Once-only systemic anecdote se isolation reduce karna before action.
text: Early-career roles mein log aise humiliation ke baad freeze bahut feel karte hain - sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolta nahi kyunki sabko stable dikhna padta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Koi raasta do simple.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness ke baad 3 micro options देना no extra burden ke saath.
text: Teen quick options: (1) 5 min paani + snack. (2) 7 min meeting facts note. (3) 5 min trusted dost ko text: "Aaj heavy day tha."

speaker: Seeker
text: Pehla do doable hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen step ko sequence mein execute karwana for grounding.
text: Pehle paani ke 6 dheere ghoont lo. Phir notes mein teen lines likho: kya bola gaya, tumhe kaisa laga, kal ka first step. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done. Clear feel ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Micro recovery validate karke self-trust reinforce karna.
text: Shame wave ke beech tumne grounded action liya, yeh real strength hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab next possible lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Kal ke liye low-pressure mini stack देना.
text: Kal ka mini stack: (1) 10 min resume update. (2) 5 min one mentor ping. (3) 5 min one role shortlist.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mentor ping mein hesitation hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Hesitation reduce karne ke liye one-line template देना.
text: Template: "Aaj meeting rough thi, kal 10 min guidance mil sakti hai?" Bas.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bhej diya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Flood-to-structure recovery pattern normalise karna.
text: Public humiliation ke baad pehle flood aur phir micro-steps se settle hona common healing path hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Steady ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Steady state validate karke dignity reinforce karna.
text: Aaj tumne shame wave ke beech bhi direction li, yeh bahut meaningful progress hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Confidence aa raha thoda.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Night closure ke do tiny anchors dena.
text: Sone se pehle do anchors: alarm set karo aur kal ka first task note top pe pin karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se subah-se-ab tak ka shift mirror karna.
text: Jahan se tum loop mein atke the, wahan se ab tumne raat tak stable rhythm bana li.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aaj ke liye enough.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final reassurance with worth-outcome separation.
text: Aaj tumne shame aur flood ke beech bhi direction wapas li. Ek incident tumhari poori keemat define nahi karta.
